name: expo-app-example
//: Standalone Expo app — excluded from the pnpm workspace (see ../../pnpm-workspace.yaml). Its Expo/RN deps never enter the monorepo lockfile. It consumes @pinagent/react-native via in-tree relative imports (App.tsx / metro.config.js), so it declares no @pinagent dep here. Run it on its own: build @pinagent/react-native from the repo root first, then `cd examples/expo-app && npm install && npx expo start`.
